llmInaccurateResponse._details: LLM service returns a hardcoded wrong product summary for product ID L9ECAV7KIM.
llmInaccurateResponse.description: LLM returns an inaccurate product summary for product ID L9ECAV7KIM

llmRateLimitError._details: LLM service returns HTTP 429 when the requested model name ends in '-rate-limit'. LLM-powered features degrade silently.
llmRateLimitError.description: LLM intermittently returns a rate limit error

productCatalogFailure._details: GetProduct always returns Internal error for product ID OLJCESPC7Z. Load generator must request that product enough times to push product-catalog RPC error rate above 1% — ServiceLatencyDegradation fires after ~1 minute.
productCatalogFailure.description: Fail product catalog service on a specific product

recommendationCacheFailure._details: Activates a buggy cache in recommendation: each population appends product IDs plus 25% extra duplicates to a growing global list. Under concurrent load this floods product-catalog with GetProduct RPCs — ServiceLatencyDegradation fires immediately.

adManualGc._details: Triggers a full JVM garbage collection on every getAds call — stop-the-world pauses cause elevated ad latency.
adManualGc.description: Triggers full manual garbage collections in the ad service

adHighCpu._details: Runs a CPU burn loop on every getAds call — ad service CPU saturates.
adHighCpu.description: Triggers high cpu load in the ad service

adFailure._details: Ad service throws UNAVAILABLE on ~1-in-10 getAds calls — frontend ad widgets return errors intermittently.

kafkaQueueProblems._details: Fraud-detection Kafka consumer sleeps 1 second per message — consumer lag grows and queue backs up.
kafkaQueueProblems.description: Overloads Kafka queue while simultaneously introducing a consumer side delay leading to a lag spike

cartFailure._details: Cart service routes EmptyCart to a bad store instead of Redis — checkout charges the card then fails to clear the cart with FAILED_PRECONDITION. UserJourneyAnomalyDetected fires when checkout FAILED_PRECONDITION rate exceeds 10%.

paymentFailure._details: Payment service randomly throws 'Invalid token' for the configured percentage of charges (tagged app.loyalty.level=gold). At high percentages checkout error rate rises and OperationalAnomalyDetected may fire.
paymentFailure.description: Fail payment service charge requests n%

paymentUnreachable._details: Checkout replaces the real payment service address with 'badAddress:50051' — 100% of payment RPCs fail. OperationalAnomalyDetected fires as soon as checkout error rate exceeds 50%.

loadGeneratorFloodHomepage._details: Load generator sends 100 additional GET / requests per virtual user tick — sudden frontend traffic spike.
loadGeneratorFloodHomepage.description: Flood the frontend with a large amount of requests.

imageSlowLoad._details: Product card image requests include x-envoy-fault-delay-request header (5s or 10s) — Envoy injects the delay before serving images, making the product listing page appear frozen.
imageSlowLoad.description: slow loading images in the frontend

failedReadinessProbe._details: Cart service readiness probe returns Unhealthy — Kubernetes removes the pod from the load balancer. Same symptom as cartFailure but triggered at the infra layer; pod stays running but receives no traffic.
failedReadinessProbe.description: readiness probe failure for cart service

emailMemoryLeak._details: On each order confirmation, email service pads the body with N times its size in whitespace (1x–10000x). RSS grows with every completed checkout — eventual OOM.
emailMemoryLeak.description: Memory leak in the email service.
